_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your credentials. config.json is gitignored.

auth._comment_garth: Preferred: garth handles Garmin SSO login automatically. Provide email + password.
auth._comment_token: Alternative: paste a Bearer token captured via mitmproxy/Charles. Overrides garth auth.
auth._comment_customer: Your Garmin account UUID. Fetched automatically on first run if using garth.
auth._comment_headers: Optional: captured from proxy traffic. May be required if Garmin adds request validation.
